infoPlist.NSLocationUsageDescription: Presence Tracker uses your location while sharing is enabled.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Presence Tracker can keep sharing your location when the app is minimized.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Presence Tracker uses your location while sharing is enabled.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Presence Tracker can keep sharing your location when the app is minimized.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Presence Tracker to share your location while the app is minimized.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Presence Tracker to use your location while sharing is enabled.
